title: Figure 1 from: Marquisseau A, Canale-Tabet K, Labarthe E, Pascal G, Klopp C, Pornon A, Escaravage N, Rudelle R, Vignal A, Ouin A, Ollivier M, Pichon M (2025) Building a reliable 16S mini-barcode library of wild bees from Occitania, south-west of France. Biodiversity Data Journal 13: e137540. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.12.e137540
author: Marquisseau, Anaïs
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Primer sequences and PCR conditions used for Sanger sequencing per Genus. For all Sanger samples, primary denaturation was performed at 95°C for 5 minutes and final elongation was performed at 72°C for 20 minutes.
steps_raw: Figure 1 Primer sequences and PCR conditions used for Sanger sequencing per Genus. For all Sanger samples, primary denaturation was performed at 95°C for 5 minutes and final elongation was performed at 72°C for 20 minutes.
